success_status.recipient_notice: Payroll recipients include the employees listed below plus the tax agencies for the taxes listed below.
success_status.license: ZenPayroll, Inc., dba Gusto is a licensed money transmitter. For more about Gusto’s licenses and your state-specific rights to request information, submit complaints, dispute errors, or cancel transactions, visit our license page.

payroll_uuid.description: A unique identifier of the payroll receipt.

company_uuid.description: A unique identifier of the company for the payroll.

name_of_sender.description: The name of the company by whom the payroll was paid

recipient_notice.description: Always the fixed string "Payroll recipients include the employees listed below plus the tax agencies for the taxes listed below."

debit_date.description: The debit or funding date for the payroll

license.description: Always the fixed string "ZenPayroll, Inc., dba Gusto is a licensed money transmitter. For more about Gusto’s licenses and your state-specific rights to request information, submit complaints, dispute errors, or cancel transactions, visit our license page."

license_uri.description: URL for the license information for the licensed payroll processor. Always the fixed string "https://gusto.com/about/licenses"

company_debit.description: The total company debit for the payroll.

net_pay_debit.description: The total company net pay for the payroll.

child_support_debit.description: The total child support debit for the payroll.

reimbursement_debit.description: The total reimbursements for the payroll.

tax_debit.description: The total tax debit for the payroll.

taxes.description: An array of totaled employer and employee taxes for the pay period.

name.description: The amount paid for this tax.

amount.description: The total amount paid by both employer and employee for this tax.

employee_compensations.description: An array of employee compensations and withholdings for this payroll

employee_first_name.description: The first name of the employee.

employee_last_name.description: The last name of the employee.

net_pay.description: The employee's net pay. Net pay paid by check is available for reference but is not included in the `["totals"]["net_pay_debit"]` amount.

total_tax.description: The total of employer and employee taxes for the pay period.

total_garnishments.description: The total garnishments for the pay period.

child_support_garnishment.description: The total child support garnishment for the pay period.

total_reimbursement.description: The total reimbursement for the pay period.

name.description: Always the fixed string "Gusto, Zenpayroll Inc."

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
